title: Code export input
description: Generate framework-specific code from a validated UiSchema.

dslVersion.description: DSL version to use for this request. Defaults to the current version (1.0).

schema.description: A validated UiSchema tree to generate code from.

schemaRef.description: Reference to a cached UiSchema returned by design.compose.

framework.description: Target framework for code generation. HTML delegates to existing repl.render document mode.

typescript.description: When true, emit TypeScript prop types (React) or typed defineProps (Vue). Ignored for HTML.

styling.description: Styling strategy: inline style objects, design-token CSS variables, or Tailwind utility classes.
